case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ALEXANDRA M. DANGERFIELD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $893.83 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT DANGERFIELD, ALEXANDRA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT DANGERFIELD, ALEXANDRA M.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$115.00) SERVED SEP-26-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANGERFIELD, ALEXANDRA M.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2023 BY LAUREN SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, BDR TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN SUJEETH, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANGERFIELD, ALEXANDRA M. $893.83 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,008.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
